name: the classifier tags a TypeScript rule to the linguist typescript axis with high confidence
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --title 'Use const not var' --prose 'Always use const in TypeScript .ts files.' --json > c.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'confidence=high' e.txt && node -e 'const c=require(process.cwd()+"/c.json");if(!c.applies_to.linguist_aliases.includes("typescript"))process.exit(1)' && echo ts-classified 1>&2
